description.value:
Sage

The Sage is a scholar, a researcher, and a keeper of knowledge. They devour information with an insatiable hunger, cataloguing facts, analysing data, and drawing connections that others miss. Whether they trained in the great libraria of the Administratum, the archives of the Mechanicus, or the forbidden collections of a radical Inquisitor, the Sage brings an invaluable analytical mind to any warband.

Role Aptitudes

Intelligence, Knowledge, Perception, Tech, Willpower

Role Talent

Keen Intuition or Infused Knowledge

Role Bonus

Quest for Knowledge: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Sage may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at a Logic or any Lore Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Intelligence Bonus.

specialAbilities.name: Quest for Knowledge
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, a Sage may spend a Fate Point to automatically succeed at a Logic or any Lore Test with a number of Degrees of Success equal to their Intelligence Bonus.
